scenarios.name: lower_ext.lowercase_extension
scenarios.description: Already lowercase extensions in the archive hot path stay allocation-free.

scenarios.name: detect_type.heuristic_uppercase_extension
scenarios.description: Filename/extension heuristics must not allocate when fast_only short-circuits Magika.

scenarios.name: scan.analyze_reader_header_only
scenarios.description: Header-only scan on the hot path should avoid heap traffic entirely.

scenarios.name: scan.analyze_reader_header_hash
scenarios.description: Header hashing should stay bounded to the single hash-string allocation.

scenarios.name: scan.analyze_reader_full_hash
scenarios.description: Full hashing should stay bounded to the two hash-string allocations.

scenarios.name: engine.process_archive_without_rows
scenarios.description: Core scan aggregation without row sinks should not regress in heap traffic.

scenarios.name: engine.process_archive_with_rows
scenarios.description: Row emission stays within a fixed allocation budget per scanned entry.

scenarios.name: serialization.entry_row_ndjson_preallocated
scenarios.description: Serializing an entry row into a preallocated buffer should avoid heap churn.
